scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @namazue/globe && npm run typecheck -w @namazue/worker
scripts.test: npm run test -w @namazue/globe && npm run test -w @namazue/worker
scripts.build: npm run build:globe && npm run build:worker
scripts.check:quick: npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.check: npm run check:quick && npm run build
scripts.build:data: npx tsx tools/build-slab2-contours.ts && npx tsx tools/build-historical-catalog.ts
